title: InvoiceKit Capability Matrix
description: Per-route, per-scenario, per-date capability advertisements for sending compliant electronic invoices. Each entry describes which profiles/transports are accepted, sourced from named jurisdictional manifests, with an explicit confidence rating and a validity window. Consumers must honor `stale_after_days` and downgrade results when a query date falls inside a stale window.

schema_version.description: Frozen schema version of this manifest. Bumped only with a real migration.

generated_at.description: Timestamp when this matrix was assembled from its sources.

stale_after_days.description: Number of days after `source.fetched_at` an entry is considered stale. Stale entries are still returned but flagged.

route_from.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 of the sender's country.

route_to.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 of the recipient's country.

id.description: Stable identifier of the accepted profile (e.g. 'xrechnung-3.0', 'peppol-bis-3.0', 'factur-x-1.0.06').

confidence.description: Confidence in the source. 'authoritative' = official regulator publication; 'low' = community-maintained or inferred.
